name: Premium Dealerships
mission: Delivering the absolute highest tier of automated and imported vehicles to the citizens of Nexus City.
vision: A dynamic vehicle economy where salesmen control stock, pricing, and the narrative of owning a masterpiece.

basic: All sales must be thoroughly logged through the finance app.
Showroom vehicles must be kept in pristine condition.
Do not abuse test drives for personal transport.
advanced: Financing options require a background check via the central banking system.
Vehicle commissions are tracked; undercutting global minimums is a fireable offense.
The theft of dealership properties falls to personal accountability.

roles.name: Owner / GM
roles.desc: Handles all inventory ordering and showroom management.

roles.name: Sales Manager
roles.desc: Oversees the sales team and manages daily quotas.

roles.name: Finance Associate
roles.desc: Handles background checks and vehicle financing.
